package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_buffer_pool_without_max_capacity: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag buffer pools that return arbitrarily large buffers and retain memory after spikes.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule579PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario579Positive(records []Rule579PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
